raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch ſwehtihs ta-
waz Meeſas Augli / un tawas
Semmes Augli / tawu Labbibu
un Dſehreenu/ un tawu Eſji/ ta-
wn Gohwju un tawu Awju Au-
gtus wirs tahs Semmes / ko
wiꞥſch taweem Tehweem ſweh-
rejs tew doht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Swehtihts buhſi tu pahr
wiﬀeem Laudim / ſarp tew nedſ
Wihrs nedſ Seewa buhs neau-
gliga / nedſ ſarp taweem Loh-
peem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGS atnems
no tew wiſſu Neweſelibu/ un ne
uſlikſ us junis ne weenu ne tahm
niknahm Egipteru Sehrgahm/ ko
tu paſihſti/ bet wiꞥſch uſlikſ tahs
us wiﬀeem/ kas tew eenihſt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tew arridſan buhs wiﬀas
tahs Tautas apriht / ko tas
KUNGS taws Deews tew no-
dohs / tawa Azz laid winnas ne
fauds / tew arri ne buhs winnu
Deeweem kalpoht / jo tas buhtu
tew par Slaſda-Walau.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ja tu tawa Sir̄di fazzitu:
ſchahs Tautas irr wairak ne ka es
eſimu/ ka warretu es tohs iſdſiht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ne bihſtees no teem/ at-
gahdajes/ ko tas KUNGS taws
Deews pee Waraũs / un pee wiſ-
feem Egiptereem darrijs irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Zaur leelahm Kahrdina-
ſchanahm/ ko tawas Azzie irr re-
dſejchas / un zaur Sihmehm un
Brihnumeem / un zaur to ſittrn
Rohku un iſſteepu Elkonu/zaur
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "fo tas KUNGS taws Deewę
tew irr iſwebddis / ta darrihs taę
KUNGS taws Deews wiﬀeem
Laudim / no kurveem tu bihſtees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tas KUNGS taws
Deews ſuhtihs arridſan Dundu-
rus winnu Starpâ / teekams tee
nomaitati tohp / kas atliksſchi/
un tawa Preeſcha päzlehpu-
ſchees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ne bailojees preekſch win-
neem / jo tas KUNGS tawę
Deews irr tawa Widdū / TAS
STIPRAIS DEEWS /
leels un zeenańs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGS tawę
Deews iſmettihs ſchths Tautas
tawa Preeſcha pamafam / pee-
peſchi tu tohs ne warri nokaut/ka
tee Swehri Laukā prett tew ne
wairojahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGS nodohę
tohs tewis Preeſcha / un fatreeks
tohs ar leelu Satreekschanu/ tee-
kams tee tohp iſdedeti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch winnu Kehni-
nus arri nodohs tawa Rohka/ ka
tu winnu Wahrdus iſnibzina ap-
pakſch Debbes/ ne weenam buhs
preekſch tew pastahweht/ teekams
tu tohs eſſi nomaitajs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Winnu iſgreestas Deewu-
Bildes buhs tew ar Ugguni fa-
dedsinaht / to Sudrabu un Sel-
tu/ kas winneem klaht irr/ tew ne
buhs eekahroht/ nedſ preekſch tew
renit / ka tu zaur to ne tohpi ee-
waldsinahts/ jo tas irr tam KUN-
GAM tawain Deewam weena
Negantiba.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
